title: Bana Bir Soygun Yaz
overview: When Onur’s girlfriend Leyla burns his belongings, including a mysterious box of pastries meant for Hacamat Hüso’s friend, she unwittingly destroys fifty thousand euros hidden inside. Homeless and confused, Onur turns to childhood pals Fiko and Süleyman, only to be grabbed by Hacamat’s men and beaten, prompting the three friends to scramble desperately to recover the lost money and save their lives.
